title: cynoglossum multicaule
intro: Cynoglossum multicaule, also known as the forked-hooded toadflax, is a flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in respiratory issues, fever reduction, and skin conditions. The forked-hooded toadflax can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in poultices to apply directly to affected areas.
